payload.answer: Not grounded: the statement "No conflicts recorded" is only supported if conflict links were explicitly checked; the provided evidence does not establish that this check occurred.
citations: Evidence: "only supports this if conflict links were checked"

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be committed from an unsupported absence claim.

details: Evidence conditions support on conflict-link checking were not met in the provided material.
No memory stored due to insufficient grounding.

repair_options: Verify whether conflict links were checked and cite that evidence explicitly.
If conflict-link verification is unavailable, revise the answer to a qualified statement reflecting uncertainty.
Avoid asserting the absence of conflicts without exhaustive or documented conflict-check evidence.
